data.title: Phantom announces support for Monad testnet
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Phantom Wallet announced support for the Monad test network on the X platform. Users can access and exchange MON test coins and explore Monad applications.

data.title: BitMart will list Broccoli f3b (BROCCOLI2)
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, BitMart will launch Broccoli f3b (BROCCOLI2) at 16:00 (Eastern Time Zone 8) on February 20, and the BROCCLI2/USDT trading pair will be opened.

data.title: 20,933 MKR were destroyed in unknown wallets, equivalent to $24.398 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to Whale Alert monitoring, about 3 minutes ago, 20,933 MKRs were destroyed in an unknown wallet, equivalent to approximately US$24.398 million.

data.title: Binance will adjust the collateral ratio of various assets
data.description: According to the official announcement, Binance will update the collateral ratio of multiple assets under portfolio margin at 06:00 (UTC) on February 24, 2025, and the update is expected to be completed within one hour. The specific adjustments are as follows: SUSHI from 85% to 75%, C98 from 80% to 70%, ENJ from 80% to 70%, PEOPLE from 50% to 40%, and OM from 30% to 20%. Please note that changes in the collateral ratio will affect the unified maintenance margin ratio (uniMMR), and users should pay close attention to uniMMR to avoid potential liquidation or losses. (This newsletter is generated by AI)

data.title: Manifold Trading is suspected of reducing its position of 3 million OM bought in November 2023, and selling it will make a profit of 22.7 million US dollars
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to monitoring by on-chain analyst Ai Yi, quantitative investment company Manifold Trading is suspected of reducing its position of 3 million OM purchased at the low point in November 2023 (US$0.04). If sold, it will make a profit of US$22.7 million. The institution's cumulative income from OM single currency has exceeded US$50.57 million.

data.title: Manifold Trading's Potential OM Sale Could Yield Significant Profits
data.description: According to Odaily, blockchain analyst Ai Yi has observed that quantitative investment firm Manifold Trading may be reducing its holdings of 3 million OM tokens, which were purchased at the low price of $0.04 in November 2023. If sold, this transaction could generate a profit of $22.7 million. The firm's total profit from OM tokens has already exceeded $50.57 million.

data.title: Vitalik Buterin Discusses Family Support In Ethereum Journey
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Ethereum co-founder Vitalik Buterin shared insights during a text-based AMA on the Tako platform on February 20. He revealed that his parents have been supportive of his work since Ethereum's inception, purchasing ETH and staying engaged with his endeavors. Prior to Ethereum's creation, they made efforts to acquire resources and learn coding to better understand and support his work.

data.title: Bitcoin Runes Platforms OdinSwap And Valhalla To Cease Operations
data.description: According to Foresight News, the Bitcoin Runes trading platforms OdinSwap and Valhalla are set to terminate their operations. Users are advised to withdraw their funds by February 28. After this date, any remaining balances will be manually refunded, subject to applicable Bitcoin network fees, and may take up to one month to process.

data.title: Bitcoin Network Rune DEX Platform OdinSwap Announces It Will Gradually Stop Operations
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, Bitcoin network Rune DEX platform OdinSwap announced that it and Rune startup platform Valhalla will gradually cease operations, and all user funds are safe. OdinSwap and Valhalla will continue to operate until February 28, 2025. Users are advised to withdraw funds before February 28. After February 28, any unclaimed balance will be manually refunded, but the appropriate BTC network fee will be paid. Refunds will be processed manually and may take up to one month to complete. Only balances that exceed the network fee will be refunded.
